zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Sudeley Boteler Lord of Rawcliffe Hall於1398年8月8日出生在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾巴德敏頓時，他的父親Sir Ralph Boteler18歲，母親Margaret Berwick18歲。他和Lady Alice Plumpton至少有3個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於1477年6月15日在他的家鄉享年78歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Sudeley Boteler Lord of Rawcliffe Hall于1398年8月8日出生在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾巴德敏頓时，他的父亲Sir Ralph Boteler18岁，母亲Margaret Berwick18岁。他和Lady Alice Plumpton至少有3个儿子和3个女儿。他去世于1477年6月15日在他的家乡享年78岁。

nameMeanings.name: Boteler
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a maker of leather bottles, from an agent derivative of Middle English botel, Old French bouteille ‘bottle’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Sudeley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Sudeley (Gloucs) or Soudley in East Dean (Gloucs).

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Sudeley Boteler Lord of Rawcliffe Hall was born on 8 August 1398, in Badminton, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Ralph Boteler, was 18 and his mother, Margaret Berwick, was 18. He had at least 3 sons and 3 daughters with Lady Alice Plumpton. He died on 15 June 1477, in his hometown, at the age of 78.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Sudeley Boteler Lord of Rawcliffe Hall est né le 8 août 1398, à Badminton, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Ralph Boteler, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Margaret Berwick, avait 18 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles avec Lady Alice Plumpton. Il est décédé le 15 juin 1477, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 78 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Sudeley Boteler Lord of Rawcliffe Hall am 8. August 1398 in Badminton, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Ralph Boteler 18 und seine Mutter Margaret Berwick 18. Er hatte mit Lady Alice Plumpton mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 15. Juni 1477 im Alter von 78 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Sudeley Boteler Lord of Rawcliffe Hall è nato il il 8 agosto 1398 nel Badminton, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Ralph Boteler, aveva 18 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Berwick, aveva 18 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie con Lady Alice Plumpton. Morì il 15 giugno 1477, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 78 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Sudeley Boteler Lord of Rawcliffe Hallが1398年8月8日にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアバドミントンで生まれた時，父Sir Ralph Botelerは18歳，母Margaret Berwickは18歳であった。彼はLady Alice Plumptonとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1477年6月15日に故郷で78歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Sudeley Boteler Lord of Rawcliffe Hall(이)가 1398년 8월 8일 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 바드민턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Ralph Boteler(은)는 18세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Berwick(은)는 18세였다. 그는 Lady Alice Plumpton(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1477년 6월 15일 그의 고향에서 78세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.8 August 1398–15 June 1477: 8 de agosto de 1398–15 de junho de 1477
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Sudeley Boteler Lord of Rawcliffe Hall nasceu em 8 de agosto de 1398, em Badminton, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Ralph Boteler, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Berwick, tinha 18 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas com Lady Alice Plumpton. Ele faleceu em 15 de junho de 1477, em sua cidade natal, com 78 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Sudeley Boteler Lord of Rawcliffe Hall родился 8 августа 1398 г. в местности бадминтон, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Ralph Boteler было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Berwick, 18. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери от Lady Alice Plumpton. Он умер 15 июня 1477 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 78 лет.

es.8 August 1398–15 June 1477: 8 de agosto de 1398–15 de junio de 1477
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Sudeley Boteler Lord of Rawcliffe Hall nació el 8 de agosto de 1398, en Badminton, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Ralph Boteler, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Margaret Berwick, tenía 18 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas con Lady Alice Plumpton. Murió el 15 de junio de 1477, en su pueblo, a la edad de 78 años.
